requirement_topic.en: SABER conformity certificates — PCoC (Product Certificate of Conformity) and SCoC (Shipment Certificate of Conformity)
requirement_topic.zh: SABER 合格证书 — PCoC（产品合格证书）和 SCoC（货物合格证书）
requirement_topic.zht: SABER 合格證書 — PCoC（產品合格證書）和 SCoC（貨物合格證書）

summary.en: Saudi Arabia operates the SABER (Saudi Arabia's platform for conformity assessment, testing, and market surveillance) system, administered by SASO. For regulated products including industrial electric motors, the system requires two certificates before shipment to Saudi Arabia: (1) PCoC (Product Certificate of Conformity) — a product-level certificate issued by a SASO-accredited Conformity Assessment Body (CAB) confirming that the product type meets the applicable Saudi technical regulations. The PCoC is linked to the product model and is typically valid for one year; it must be obtained before any shipment of that model. (2) SCoC (Shipment Certificate of Conformity) — a shipment-level certificate issued for each individual shipment, referencing the PCoC. The SCoC is required for Saudi customs clearance. Without valid PCoC and SCoC, shipments will be blocked at Saudi ports of entry. The SABER platform is accessible at saber.sa. Exporters and their Saudi importers must register on the SABER platform and engage a SASO-accredited CAB.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯通过 SABER 系统（沙特合格评定、检测和市场监督平台，由 SASO 管理）对受监管产品（包括工业电动机）实施市场准入管理。发货至沙特阿拉伯前须取得两项证书：(1) PCoC（产品合格证书）——由 SASO 认可的合格评定机构（CAB）颁发的产品级证书，确认该产品型号符合适用的沙特技术法规。PCoC 与产品型号绑定，通常有效期一年；须在该型号首次发货前取得。(2) SCoC（货物合格证书）——针对每批货物单独颁发的证书，需引用 PCoC。SCoC 是沙特海关清关的必要文件。如无有效 PCoC 和 SCoC，货物将在沙特入境口岸被扣押。SABER 平台网址为 saber.sa。出口商及其沙特进口商须在 SABER 平台注册，并委托 SASO 认可的 CAB。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯通過 SABER 系統（沙特合格評定、檢測和市場監督平台，由 SASO 管理）對受監管產品（包括工業電動機）實施市場准入管理。發貨至沙特阿拉伯前須取得兩項證書：(1) PCoC（產品合格證書）——由 SASO 認可的合格評定機構（CAB）頒發的產品級證書，確認該產品型號符合適用的沙特技術法規。PCoC 與產品型號綁定，通常有效期一年；須在該型號首次發貨前取得。(2) SCoC（貨物合格證書）——針對每批貨物單獨頒發的證書，需引用 PCoC。SCoC 是沙特海關清關的必要文件。如無有效 PCoC 和 SCoC，貨物將在沙特入境口岸被扣押。SABER 平台網址為 saber.sa。出口商及其沙特進口商須在 SABER 平台注冊，並委托 SASO 認可的 CAB。

standards_or_laws: SABER platform — saber.sa (Saudi Arabia conformity assessment system for regulated products)
SASO Decision / Ministerial Order establishing mandatory SABER requirements (verify current scope at saso.gov.sa)

summary.en: China has no direct equivalent to the SABER PCoC/SCoC pre-shipment conformity certificate system for industrial motors. For domestic Chinese market entry, motors must comply with GB 18613-2020 (MEPS) and GB 755-2019 (safety/performance), but there is no pre-shipment conformity certificate issued by a government-accredited body that is required before domestic supply. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) applies to specific product categories in the CNCA compulsory catalogue; standard industrial three-phase motors are generally not in the compulsory CCC catalogue, so most Chinese industrial motors are produced and sold domestically without a CCC certificate. There is no bilateral conformity certificate recognition arrangement between Saudi Arabia and China for industrial motors.
summary.zh: 中国对工业电动机没有类似 SABER PCoC/SCoC 的发货前合格证书制度。在中国国内市场，电动机须符合 GB 18613-2020（MEPS）和 GB 755-2019（安全/性能）要求，但在国内供应前无需由政府认可机构颁发发货前合格证书。CCC（强制性产品认证）适用于 CNCA 强制认证目录所列特定产品类别；一般工业三相电动机通常不在强制 CCC 目录内，因此大多数中国工业电动机在国内生产和销售无需 CCC 证书。沙特阿拉伯与中国之间不存在工业电动机合格证书的双边互认安排。
summary.zht: 中國對工業電動機沒有類似 SABER PCoC/SCoC 的發貨前合格證書制度。在中國國內市場，電動機須符合 GB 18613-2020（MEPS）和 GB 755-2019（安全/性能）要求，但在國內供應前無需由政府認可機構頒發發貨前合格證書。CCC（強制性產品認證）適用於 CNCA 強制認證目錄所列特定產品類別；一般工業三相電動機通常不在強制 CCC 目錄內，因此大多數中國工業電動機在國內生產和銷售無需 CCC 證書。沙特阿拉伯與中國之間不存在工業電動機合格證書的雙邊互認安排。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (mandatory MEPS — no equivalent pre-shipment certificate required domestically)
CNCA CCC compulsory catalogue (standard industrial three-phase motors generally not listed — verify current catalogue)
GB 755-2019 (mandatory safety/performance — self-declaration for domestic market)

gap.en: The SABER PCoC + SCoC pre-shipment conformity certificate requirement is the single most structurally unique Saudi Arabia market-access barrier for Chinese motor exporters. It has no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) No amount of Chinese certifications or factory test reports substitutes for a SABER PCoC issued by a SASO-accredited CAB. (2) The PCoC must be obtained before the first shipment of a given motor model — it cannot be applied for retroactively to clear goods at port. (3) Each shipment requires a separate SCoC, which is only issuable after a valid PCoC exists. (4) Chinese CCC certificates (even where held) are not accepted as equivalents. (5) SABER registration must be completed by the Saudi importer on the saber.sa platform, typically in coordination with the Chinese exporter who provides technical dossiers. Lead time for PCoC issuance from a CAB can range from several weeks to months depending on product complexity and CAB workload.
gap.zh: SABER PCoC + SCoC 发货前合格证书要求是中国电动机出口商面临的最具结构性特征的沙特阿拉伯市场准入障碍，在中国国内无任何对应制度：(1) 任何中国认证或工厂测试报告均无法替代由 SASO 认可的 CAB 颁发的 SABER PCoC；(2) 须在特定型号首次发货前取得 PCoC，不能在货物到港后补办；(3) 每批货物须单独取得 SCoC，且只有在 PCoC 有效的前提下方可颁发；(4) 即使持有 CCC 证书，也不被接受作为等效证书；(5) SABER 注册须由沙特进口商在 saber.sa 平台完成，通常需要中国出口商提供技术文件配合。PCoC 的颁发周期因产品复杂度和 CAB 工作量不同，可能从数周至数月不等。
gap.zht: SABER PCoC + SCoC 發貨前合格證書要求是中國電動機出口商面臨的最具結構性特徵的沙特阿拉伯市場准入障礙，在中國國內無任何對應制度：(1) 任何中國認證或工廠測試報告均無法替代由 SASO 認可的 CAB 頒發的 SABER PCoC；(2) 須在特定型號首次發貨前取得 PCoC，不能在貨物到港後補辦；(3) 每批貨物須單獨取得 SCoC，且只有在 PCoC 有效的前提下方可頒發；(4) 即使持有 CCC 證書，也不被接受作為等效證書；(5) SABER 注冊須由沙特進口商在 saber.sa 平台完成，通常需要中國出口商提供技術文件配合。PCoC 的頒發週期因產品複雜度和 CAB 工作量不同，可能從數週至數月不等。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — shipments without valid SABER PCoC and SCoC will be blocked at Saudi ports of entry
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent pre-shipment conformity certificate system for industrial motors in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SABER PCoC and SCoC are non-negotiable prerequisites for motor shipments to Saudi Arabia. They cannot be replaced by any Chinese certification. The Saudi importer must register on the SABER platform and engage a SASO-accredited CAB to obtain the PCoC before the first shipment of each motor model. The Chinese exporter must provide a complete technical dossier (IEC 60034-1 test reports, IEC 60034-30-1:2014 (Ed.1, IE1-IE4) efficiency data, IEC 60034-2-1 test results, product data sheets, and the energy-efficiency declaration) to support the PCoC application. Early engagement with a SASO-accredited CAB is strongly recommended to avoid shipment delays.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SABER PCoC 和 SCoC 是电动机发货至沙特阿拉伯不可缺少的前提条件，无法由任何中国认证替代。沙特进口商须在 SABER 平台注册，并委托 SASO 认可的 CAB，在各电动机型号首次发货前取得 PCoC。中国出口商须提供完整的技术文件（IEC 60034-1 测试报告、IEC 60034-30-1:2014 (Ed.1, IE1-IE4) 能效数据、IEC 60034-2-1 测试结果、产品数据表及能效声明）以支持 PCoC 申请。强烈建议尽早联系 SASO 认可的 CAB，以避免发货延误。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SABER PCoC 和 SCoC 是電動機發貨至沙特阿拉伯不可或缺的前提條件，無法由任何中國認證替代。沙特進口商須在 SABER 平台注冊，並委托 SASO 認可的 CAB，在各電動機型號首次發貨前取得 PCoC。中國出口商須提供完整的技術文件（IEC 60034-1 測試報告、IEC 60034-30-1:2014 (Ed.1, IE1-IE4) 能效數據、IEC 60034-2-1 測試結果、產品數據表及能效聲明）以支持 PCoC 申請。強烈建議盡早聯繫 SASO 認可的 CAB，以避免發貨延誤。
